The Money Trail: Tracking Campaign Cash

January/February 2000
Government & PoliticsJournalism & NewsroomInvestigative Methods

IRE and NICAR are offering workshops on campaign finance data analysis across multiple Midwest cities from January through March, with registration details available on the Campaign Finance Information Center website.

These IRE and NICAR workshops on using campaign finance data will be held over the next few months in various cities. More information is available at the Campaign Finance Information Center Web site, www.campaignfinance.org/seminar.html

Here are the dates and locations:

Jan. 22-23: Lansing, Mich.

Feb. 5-6: Columbus, Ohio

Feb. 26-27: Springfield, Ill.

March 4-5: Madison, Wis.

March 25-26: Indianapolis, Ind.
